title: Sweet and Comforting Plant-Based Whale Jeon
description: A malty, shaggy Korean dish featuring a sweet chili sauce, salt-baked plant-based whale jeon that is comforting and suitable for vegans.
instructions: In a mixing bowl, combine oat flour and nutritional yeast. Add water until it reaches the desired consistency.
Gradually mix in coconut oil while continuously stirring to create a shaggy mixture.
Transfer the batter onto a non-stick baking sheet and spread evenly with a spatula.
Brush a layer of sweet chili sauce on top of the jeon for extra flavor.
Sprinkle salt over the jeon, then bake in an oven preheated to 180°C (350°F) until golden brown, approximately 20 minutes.
Remove from oven and let cool slightly before serving.
